name: Breath In
description: Deep inhalation gathering energy before action

prompts.label: deep inhalation gathering atmospheric energy before action
prompts.text: deep inhalation gathering atmospheric energy before action, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay

prompts.label: air rushing inward with expanding chest-like reverb swell
prompts.text: air rushing inward with expanding chest-like reverb swell, tape-saturated warmth, granular piano cloud, candlelight flickering softly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, smooth fade out

prompts.label: sonic breath drawing in surrounding frequencies
prompts.text: sonic breath drawing in surrounding frequencies, Brian Eno infinite space, reversed cymbal swell, underwater weightlessness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, sustained resonance

prompts.label: world growing quiet as atmosphere is drawn to center
prompts.text: world growing quiet as atmosphere is drawn to center, abandoned hall echo, harmonium drone with tape wobble, drifting between sleep and waking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, with natural decay

prompts.label: vacuum of anticipation pulling sound inward
prompts.text: vacuum of anticipation pulling sound inward, lo-fi cassette hiss and bloom, shimmer reverb pad wash, moonlight through frosted glass, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, smooth fade out
